findings.sentence: Skill transfer is the bridge between “people learned something” and “ [performance changed](https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/abs/10.1177/0018720819845988).” The work environment is part of the design: peer support, manager coaching, and organizational reinforcement determine whether new behaviors stick after the session ends.
findings.title: Link blocks bots (403)
findings.suggested_fix: Link returned 403 to an automated HEAD check. 403 usually means the site is bot-blocking, not that the link is broken. Spot-check in a browser to confirm.

findings.sentence: Managers are the fastest path from “completed training” to “ [changed behavior.](https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/pdf/10.1080/1359432X.2024.2319082)” They translate the standard into day-to-day expectations, create practice moments in real work, and reinforce what “good” looks like when things get messy.

findings.sentence: That’s an [operating model challenge](https://www.mckinsey.com/capabilities/people-and-organizational-performance/our-insights/a-new-operating-model-for-a-new-world) as much as a content challenge.
findings.title: Dead link (unreachable)
findings.suggested_fix: Link is unreachable (no HTTP response — DNS failure, refused connection, or site is down). Remove or replace.

findings.title: Link blocks bots (405)
findings.suggested_fix: www.linkedin.com blocks automated checks (returned 405). Manual spot-check in a browser if you want to be sure.
